Crimson
🧠 Class
Thinker (Strategist)
Level
5 (125 XP)
Status
Active
Power
Has increased access to wound infliction through local postcognition, but their power is rather vague.
Background
Their power is a bud off of another team member.
Profile
Age: 14
v1.1 Systems
Stress: 0/100
Trait lean: Calm +2 (contributes to squad calm-path chance on MCS/PR ops)
Dissonance: 24
Traits
• Aggressive — favors kidnap scout in heists; main detail in protection
• Reserved — favors stealth entry in heists; main detail in protection
• Cautious — bodyguard assignment in protection
• Cooperative — tie-breaker in op-votes; fills empty protection roles
Base Stats
STR 3 | VIT 6 | UTL 5◆ | CTR 2 | TEQ 6★
Total: 22 (18 at scout)
Effective Stats (with gear/feats)
STR 3 | VIT 6 | UTL 5 | CTR 2 | TEQ 7
Loadout
Weapon: Baseball Bat (Cap 1)
Costume: empty
Gadget: empty
Capacity: 1/3
🌐 Minor Powers (cluster echoes)
• Tinker/Surveillance: Tinkers with modular cyborgs through hard work and discipline, but they can not build anything not within that narrowly defined spec
• Mover/Blitz: Can move short distances via deploying their biological aerodynamic appendages while remaining still in motion
• Blaster/Nuker: Shoots tentacles from another person that inflict ongoing damage targets
🌐 Cluster cape (max level 5)
• Vikki Coltun (Mover) — @superservo27
• Dee Sparke (Blaster) — @Armourbug [|] Penumbra

ID: 734 | Bench
